product_base.title: POP MART CRYBABY × Powerpuff Girls Series Figures,  Blind Box, Mystery Box

text_attribute.text: Designer: POP MART
Release Date:March, 2024
Material: ABS/PVC
Manufacturer recommended age：15 years and up

Blind Box: All items are figurine products with different designs. Each box contains one random design for value of 19.99. USD, and comes in a sealed box with no one knows what's inside-including us. This whole collection contains 12 regular figurine products (Odds: 1/12), and 1 secret edition(Odds:1/144).
Please be noted: you'll get a whole set for purchasing 12 single boxes
Return Policy
Blind box

” means no one knows which exact figurine of the series you may get before opening—nor do us. A regular figurine will be replaced if the secret edition appears in the whole set (big congratulations!!!)
Thus, we CANNOT guarantee which exact figurine you will get upon purchase.
We also CANNOT guarantee that any purchase will definitely get the secret edition (please refer to the probability on product package).
Number of figurines in each series varies.
REMINDER: due to the special feature mentioned above, we DO NOT offer any refund or exchange, except for following reasons:
Defects
Blind box goods are designer toys with heavy handmade participation in craft production.
Minor defect such as uneven coloring, slight scratches, paint drops or bubbles are common; if there are serious defects, please apply for after-sale service after receiving goods.
Card & Accessories
If the card inside the Blind box does not match the figurine, we will supplement the corresponding card according to the piece.
Duplicate figures
If the whole box has duplicate figures, the missing regular figurine will be provided and the duplicated figurine will be taken back.
Special products
For MEGA 1000% product, please kindly provide the identity IDs of the related products when you reach out to customer service.
Limited Edition Products
The after-sales rules of Limited Edition Products shall be subject to the specific notice of event publicity.
Special secret edition card exchange
For some series, we offer secret edition redeem card. Please reach out to customer support for redeem.

IMPORTANT: For products we sell and OPEN(under your instruction of course) during live stream, we DONOT offer any refund once opened, expect for product defects. For further information and please contact our customer support.

see_more.title: One-click pay
see_more.description:
By tapping Place order, the item(s) will not be added to your cart. We’ll charge you for the item(s) directly.
We’ll apply the best discounts you have available, and you can change the discounts by yourself. The total you pay will be the price after discounts and taxes.
The order will normally be paid with same payment method of your last order.
All the one-click pay orders enjoy free shipping benefits. The item(s) will be delivered to the same address of last order and normally will be delivered in same parcel(s) of the last order.
